sections.description: WordPress-native bookings CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.8.9.42: Added deep debugging for guest creation to identify database insert/retrieve issues.
  • 1.8.9.41: Improved guest creation flow with better debugging and separate find/create steps.
  • 1.8.9.40: Fixed MotoPress mapping to include first_name and last_name fields for proper guest matching.
  • 1.8.9.39: Added detailed debugging for booking creation to track guest ID assignment.
  • 1.8.9.38: Fixed guest matching inconsistency between preview and import by using same guest data in both phases.
  • 1.8.9.37: Fixed guest matching to prevent false matches by disabling name-only matching.
  • 1.8.9.36: Fixed guest creation by removing 'state' field (not in guests table schema).
  • 1.8.9.35: Added debugging for guest creation to identify why guests aren't being created.
  • 1.8.9.34: Pass all guest details (address, phone, etc.) to guest creation during booking import.
  • 1.8.9.33: Save full guest details (address, phone, email, etc.) when creating guests during MotoPress import.
  • 1.8.9.32: Extract full guest details from MotoPress API response (address, phone, email, etc.).
  • 1.8.9.31: MotoPress sync always uses 'website' channel.
  • 1.8.9.30: Map MotoPress channel to website when source is 'website', use date_created for contacted_date.
  • 1.8.9.29: Improved MotoPress guest name extraction from API response.
  • 1.8.9.28: Create guests automatically during MotoPress booking import when not found.
  • 1.8.9.27: Sync MotoPress bookings via REST API (like preview/import) before falling back to background synchronizer.
  • 1.8.9.26: Use dedicated admin sync action and sync MotoPress rooms from configured sync URLs only.
  • 1.8.9.25: Render sync notice via admin_notices so it stays on main admin page, not inside calendar content.
  • 1.8.9.24: Force sync button to true circle and show sync notice only on main admin page after redirect.
  • 1.8.9.23: Make sync button fully round and move sync notice to main calendar page after redirect.
  • 1.8.9.22: Make calendar sync button icon-only and queue all MotoPress room iCal syncs together with Booking.com ICS sync.
  • 1.8.9.21: Restrict Booking.com auto-cancel to ICS skeleton bookings only.
  • 1.8.9.20: Clear calendar cache on plugin update so confirmed-only calendar rules apply immediately.
  • 1.8.9.19: Show only confirmed bookings on calendar.
  • 1.8.9.18: Hide cancelled bookings from calendar.
  • 1.8.9.17: Hide merged archive bookings from calendar so merged manual booking shows correctly.
  • 1.8.9.16: Fix Merge Bookings menu page to use working Merges candidate view instead of broken empty query.
  • 1.8.8.91: Mark missing Booking.com reservations cancelled when ICS no longer shows their UID.
  • 1.8.8.90: Make room pricing use adults + children (babies excluded) in backend and live form previews.
  • 1.8.8.89: Add Booking Merges approval tool to combine same-channel same-date different-room bookings into one booking.
  • 1.8.8.88: Add Booking.com ICS grouping debug preview to inspect multi-room reservation keys before grouping imports.
